function.name: calculate_time_difference
function.description: Calculate the difference in hours, minutes, and seconds between two times.
function.long_description: Computes the time difference between two times and returns the result in hours, minutes, seconds, and total seconds.
example_user_queries: Calculate the time difference between 09:15 and 17:45.
How many hours apart are 08:00 AM and 01:30 PM using %I:%M %p?
Compute time difference for t1 06:30 and t2 09:05 with format %H:%M.
What is the gap between 11:45 and 16:00?
Determine the difference between 07:15 PM and 10:50 PM.
Show the elapsed time from 00:10 to 03:40.
Calculate hours and minutes between 05:25 and 12:05.
How much time is there between 10:00 and 10:45?
